title: Argument Parsing with Clap
content:
Clap's derive API lets you define CLI arguments as a struct. Each field becomes a flag, option, or positional argument. Clap automatically generates help text, validates input, and provides shell completions.

Positional arguments are fields without #[arg(short/long)]. Flags are bool fields with #[arg(short, long)]. Options accept values with #[arg(short, long)]. Optional arguments use Option<T>. Repeated arguments use Vec<T>.
keyPoints: Positional args: fields without short/long attributes
ValueEnum restricts choices to a predefined set
